channel.title: Comments for page "Green Day II"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Green Day II"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I felt like this dropped a lot of ideas in not enough space, future entries should shoot to be a bit longer, I think, try and get some legs going and build on what's being laid out.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I actually do plan on including other GoIs in on this later. I can understand the causal reference to GoIs annoying people, however, and I'll think about which ones to cut and which ones to leave in.

And, if possible, I'd like to make this a canon revolving around the universe of 2238, but baby steps, baby steps.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The alternate universe of a fictional universe… Ok, I am buying this.

That being said, the excessive name-dropping of GoIs hit a raw nerve on me though… I wonder if the series will bring them to the spotlight… eventually?

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
This was written in less than a week. It's probably the shortest time I've taken to write an article. Hopefully people like it.

Thanks to Kakroom, Modern_Erasmus, MaliceAfterthought, and DrChandra for critique.

photo: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:BernardMadoff.jpg Photo is within public domain.
